task: Fix the typo in the footer: change "Recieve" to "Receive".
Rename the submit-btn CSS class to submit-button across the auth forms.
Add an info log line in session.py when a user's token expires.
Bump the upload_timeout from 30s to 60s in the .env file.
Fix the failing lint check by adding the missing import in utils.js.
Replace the old hero image in assets/landing.png with the new marketing asset.
Make the sidebar 250px wide instead of 200px in layout.css.
Add a helper function format_phone that strips dashes and parens from a string.
Update the README to reflect the new docker-compose command.
Add a database index on orders.created_at for faster date-range queries.
Increase the API retry limit from 3 to 5 in the client config.
Add a unit test for the discount-percentage helper.
Change the default page size on the results endpoint from 20 to 50.
Reformat the whole payments module with the project's black/prettier config.
Add a --version flag to the CLI that prints the package version.
Wrap the debug print in feed.py behind the existing logger at debug level.
Update the copyright year in the site footer to the current year.
Add a tooltip to the 'Export' button explaining what formats are supported.
Correct the alt text on the profile avatar image for accessibility.
Pin the requests library to the version already used in production in requirements.txt.
Add a new "Team Members" screen to the admin dashboard showing paginated avatars, roles, and an invite button.
Create a POST /v2/notifications endpoint that accepts a JSON payload and routes it through the existing SNS topic.
Run a non-destructive migration to add a last_login_at timestamp column to the users table and update the ORM models.
Wire the staging environment to pull deployment secrets from AWS Secrets Manager instead of hardcoding them in the ECS task definition.
Implement the offline queue for the "Submit Receipt" flow so images persist locally and sync when connectivity returns.
Build a preprocessing script that normalizes email addresses and strips HTML tags before inserting records into the training dataset.
Add rate-limiting middleware to the login route using a sliding-window counter in Redis.
Write a deploy:rollout command that triggers a blue/green deployment and waits for the new ALB target group to pass health checks.
Implement the I2C polling routine for the temperature sensor and map raw ADC values to Celsius using the existing calibration table.
Create the inventory-slot UI that renders items, shows hover tooltips, and fires a custom event when a slot is clicked.
Add a filterable search bar on the products page that sorts by price, category, and in-stock status and debounces the API call.
Add a weekly digest email job that queries users with newsletter_opt_in=true and sends a markdown summary via the existing mailer.
Integrate Stripe Checkout for the new subscription plan, including the success and cancel redirect pages.
Add CSV export to the reports page that streams the current filtered result set.
Build a settings screen where users can toggle email, push, and SMS notification preferences, persisted per user.
Add pagination and sorting to the existing orders REST endpoint.
Create a webhook receiver for GitHub push events that kicks off the existing CI job.
Add a dark-mode theme toggle that persists the choice and respects the OS preference on first load.
Wire up a nightly job that snapshots the metrics table into a reporting schema.

We're seeing intermittent double-spending in the payment queue above 5k RPS; a race condition in the idempotency check commits after the response is sent. Refactor the transaction boundary to guarantee atomicity without breaking the async job flow.

Migrate our service mesh from mTLS v1 to v2 across all clusters with no downtime: roll out new cert-issuing configs, update sidecar proxies, keep backward compatibility for legacy clients, and flag handshake failures in monitoring.

The iOS app crashes after ~2 hours of background location tracking; Instruments shows the location manager isn't releasing its delegate, creating a retain cycle with the analytics singleton. Audit the lifecycle hooks and fix the leak.

Implement a distributed training loop for the recommendation model that handles stragglers gracefully; the parameter-server approach bottlenecks on gradient aggregation, so switch to all-reduce with gradient compression to fit the GPU cluster.

Overhaul the RBAC engine to support hierarchical roles with dynamic, attribute-based policy evaluation; the hardcoded checks don't scale, and we need to integrate an external policy engine (OPA) while keeping sub-millisecond latency per call.

Refactor the multiplayer sync to a deterministic lockstep model with client-side prediction and server reconciliation; the current state-sync has too much latency for competitive play, and we must recover from desyncs without resetting game state.

Fix hydration mismatches in the dashboard where client and server render different DOM due to dynamic window dimensions, causing React to remount components and kill performance; implement a layout detection strategy consistent across SSR and CSR.

Replace the synchronous Order -> Inventory -> Shipping call chain with a Saga orchestration to handle partial failures: design the compensating transactions, implement a saga coordinator, and ensure idempotent handling across the event bus.

Add a not-null column to a 2TB table without taking the primary DB offline: shadow table, chunked backfill, dual-write during transition, and a name swap in a maintenance window with a fallback if drift is detected.
The editor lags rendering documents over 50k lines; implement virtual scrolling with a layout-estimation algorithm that handles dynamic font sizes and mixed media without layout thrashing on scroll.
A render loop in the dashboard component hangs the main thread and freezes the browser until the user force-quits the tab; find the update cycle causing it and break the loop.

The offline sync for the field app loses data when multiple users edit the same record; implement a CRDT-based conflict resolution that preserves all changes and add a UI for users to resolve remaining ambiguities.

Implement a real-time fraud-detection job on the Kafka stream with session-based aggregation and late-arriving data; define the watermark strategy, bound the state size, and guarantee exactly-once semantics to the sink.
Write a Kubernetes operator to manage the lifecycle of our database clusters: backups, restores, zero-downtime version upgrades, and autoscaling on custom metrics from our monitoring system.

Implement a priority-inversion-free RTOS task scheduler for the sensor-fusion module; the current polling misses deadlines under heavy interrupt load, so design the semaphore protocol and validate timing on the logic analyzer.

Refactor the i18n layer to support RTL layouts and complex number/date formatting for 20+ languages without hardcoded strings; integrate ICU and ensure dynamically injected content is also translated and formatted.
Optimize the monorepo Bazel build; it thrashes the remote cache on large PRs. Implement smarter dependency-graph analysis to rebuild the minimal target subset and tune the cache eviction policy.
Investigate why p99 latency on the search endpoint tripled last week and find the root cause across the query planner, cache layer, and the new ranking model.
Checkout allows double-submission under poor network conditions, charging users twice for the same order.
The customer profile page caches the full address and SSN in localStorage after a password reset, and it persists across account switches.
There's no rate limit on the password-reset endpoint, so credential-stuffing runs unchecked against premium accounts.
Inventory decrement runs outside a transaction, producing negative stock and overselling by hundreds of units.
A legacy SQL migration script accidentally drops the users table instead of adding the new email_verified column.
The backup retention policy miscalculates the cutoff and purges the last 18 hours of write-ahead logs before they're verified.
The payment webhook retries on failure but replays the original request body, sending duplicate capture notifications to the banking gateway.
The support portal exposes a direct object reference on invoice IDs, letting anyone fetch invoices for any account.
The connection pool never releases cursors after a timeout, eventually exhausting all DB connections and taking the API offline during evening traffic.
The mobile app stores push tokens and device IDs in plaintext shared preferences, readable by any co-installed app on the device.
The ML training pipeline writes weights to the same S3 bucket as production artifacts with no versioning, overwriting the last stable model when a bad run finishes.
The CLI deploy tool runs rm -rf on the working directory with no dry-run when an env flag is misspelled, wiping the staging environment.
The embedded OTA update doesn't validate the signed image header, so a compromised supply-chain package can brick thousands of field devices.
The refund API credits the wrong customer when two transactions share a transaction ID due to a race condition.
The CDN cache key omits the query parameters for the pricing API, serving discounted prices to users who should see full price.
Replication lag makes the read replica show deleted records as active, triggering false duplicate detection in the billing system.
The auth middleware skips session validation for a decommissioned internal IP range, leaving an open door to admin endpoints.
A data-warehouse ETL job uses a full table drop instead of a partition truncate, destroying six months of historical analytics before the reporting deadline.
A legacy cron job that deletes records older than 90 days uses a hardcoded date pointing to last year, wiping the entire Q3 dataset.
The PDF export renders user markdown without sanitization, executing arbitrary JavaScript when the PDF is opened in a browser.
A Kubernetes HPA scales on a stale metrics endpoint, so a traffic spike takes the service offline before new pods are ready.
The mobile deep link doesn't validate its destination path, letting an attacker open arbitrary URL schemes and exfiltrate session cookies.
A background job double-books the same calendar slot for two customers when requests arrive within the same second.

Build a real-time photo-filtering pipeline with Metal compute shaders; the CPU path is too slow for 4K video frames, so write the kernels and integrate them into the camera session with careful memory management to avoid frame drops.
Implement a BLE mesh network for the new IoT device cluster: message relay, routing tables, and secure key distribution, all while keeping standby power under 10uA.
Integrate a soft-body physics solver for the ragdoll system using a mass-spring model with Verlet integration, and keep 60fps with 50+ characters via a broad-phase BVH.

Design a distributed search index supporting fuzzy matching, synonyms, and faceted navigation over petabytes; pick between Elasticsearch, Typesense, or a custom Tantivy build and design the sharding strategy.

Make the ETL pipeline schema-agnostic so upstream format changes don't require a deploy: a dynamic schema registry that validates records, maps fields by fuzzy matching, and routes malformed data to a quarantine queue.
Set up a GitOps workflow with ArgoCD including automated health checks and a rollback strategy for multi-region deployments.
Profile and fix a memory leak in the long-running websocket gateway that slowly climbs to an OOM over about a day under normal load.
